MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND 2.6C AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN APRIL 20, 2015 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE EACH CAUSE OF ACTION SEPARATELY. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO THE TENTATIVE APPROVED AS TO FORM OR IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK:N. WONG, NOT REPORTED, D501.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Continued To May-04-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Is Completed
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Denise A. Leadbetter, Esq., (415)713-8680 for Defendants/Moving parties Vladimir Federov and Galina Fedorova.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT VLADIMIR FEDEROV, GALINA FEDOROVA Motion To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Is Completed is GRANTED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration By Defendants/Petitioners Vladimir Fedorov And Galina Fedorova
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Denise A. Leadbetter, Esq., (415)713-8680 for Defendants/Moving parties Vladimir Federov and Galina Fedorova.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT VLADIMIR FEDEROV, GALINA FEDOROVA Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration By Defendants/Petitioners Vladimir Fedorov And Galina Fedorova is GRANTED. The Court finds that the arbitration clause in the parties' agreement - e.g., "any dispute relating to this agreement or the Property" - encompasses the second and third counts of the three-count complaint. No attorneys' fees are awarded. order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Continued To Nov-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Connors, Esq. (415-896-6000) for Plaintiff/opposing party Kevin Cochrane.
Denise Leadbetter, Esq. (415-713-8680) for Defendant/Moving party VLADIMIR FEDEROV, GALINA FEDOROVA.

The Court announces the Tentative ruling The burden is on the moving party. Defendant argues. Defendant requests to stay. The Court says the issue is not before the Court. The Court denies the request for judicial notice on arbitration. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VLADIMIR FEDEROV, GALINA FEDOROVA DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, Second Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges Plaintiff's entitlement to proceed with partition under TIC. Declaration may not be considered on demurrer. Request for Judicial notice is not made with the moving papers. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Sep-23-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of General And Special Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Partition Of Real Property, Intentional Infliction Of Emotional Distress, And Injury To Personal Property
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances by either party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS VLADIMIR FEDEROV and GALINA FEDEROVA's General And Special Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Partition Of Real Property, Intentional Infliction Of Emotional Distress, And Injury To Personal Property is
SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each cause of action separately. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT VLADIMIR FEDEROV and GALINA FEDEROVA's Special Demurrer To First Amended Complaint For Partition Of Real Property, Intentional Infliction Of Emotional Distress, And Injury To Personal Property is CONTINUED to May 29, 2015.
